title: paeonia officinalis var. humilis
intro: Paeonia officinalis var. humilis, also known as Dwarf Peony or Low Peony, is a variety of the perennial herb Paeonia officinalis, native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects, helping to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Paeonia officinalis var. humilis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Paeonia officinalis var. humilis is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, and can be used externally to treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds.
